Dissapointing!! 
I came here NOT for a Laugh gag and watching Random strangers singing on Stage in return I was actually expecting Wild fun, adventures, dancing all night , keep drinking and excitement in this BAR but NOthing like this Happened!!
Then I just went back an hour to an hour and 30 minutes Later!!

i WAS Expecting some actions, wild funs and adventures by going to this Bar but end up its All just singing from Random strangers on stage at the second floor and just came 5-6pers.  the whole Night I was there!!
The FIRST Floor even WORSE everyone was replying messages or texting on their phones and just chit chat within their own Groups Then LEFT!!
I felt so empty and Hopeless that I just Left after an hour to two!

I spent one hour in here then I just Left and walked back to my Hotel for an 1hour and 50 minutes!
I saw this Bar has the Most reviews out of New york so i decided to explore and see but Sadly there were no crowds in here at all as all of them just focusing on their phones and talking to each others within their own group of friends!
This is Exactly not the bars I expected when I came to New york LGBT Bars as I expect dancing all night and keep pouring on my drinks while getting to meet new friends and new LGBT people to talk to....
Regardless its an experience to know
